pi_items.source: export_result.sh EXPECTED_SCREENSHOT variable and verifier.py file check
setup_task.sh TARGET_FILE variable and data file inspection showing PhysioNet S001 dataset
verifier.py validation logic checks if output_size_bytes > 50000
verifier.py VLM verification prompt explicitly asks for 'time_series_visible' and 'head_plot_visible'

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the OpenBCI GUI layout to display both the 'Time Series' and 'Head Plot' widgets. It operates on real human EEG data from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (Subject S001, Eyes Open baseline). Success is strictly evaluated based on the creation of a valid screenshot at /home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/head_plot_session.png with a minimum file size of 50KB.
